name: 项目吸收与原创化融合
summary: Project absorption workflow for extracting useful ideas from reference systems and redesigning them into original, project-native improvements.
description: Use when absorbing ideas, capabilities, workflows, architecture, quality systems, ecosystem extensions, or engineering practices from any reference system into the current project through original, project-native redesign rather than copying.

boundaryWorkflows: Use source-driven development when reference behavior depends on official docs, version-sensitive APIs, or project facts.
Use documentation sync when absorbed capabilities change public docs, runtime docs, metadata, or published capability tables.
Use refactor clean when the absorption work first requires removing proven dead code, duplicate modules, or unused dependencies.
